wsc-frankenphp-utils.title: WSC FrankenPHP Utils
wsc-frankenphp-utils.description: FrankenPHP worker management and cache control
wsc-frankenphp-utils.info: Here you can manually restart FrankenPHP workers, clear the cache or compile themes. All actions clear not only the Shopware file cache but also OPcache – making them equivalent to a full container restart. These actions are also executed automatically on plugin events (install, update, activate, deactivate, uninstall) depending on your configuration.

actions.title: Manual Actions
actions.description: Run individual actions manually or use Full Deploy (top right) for everything at once.

actions.cacheRestartHint: Clears Shopware file cache and OPcache – then restarts all FrankenPHP workers. Equivalent to a container restart.
actions.cacheClearHint: Clears the Shopware file cache (cache:clear) and OPcache. PHP recompiles all classes on next request.
actions.themeCompileHint: Recompiles all themes (theme:compile) – may take a few minutes. Follow up with "Clear cache + restart workers" afterwards.
actions.restartHint: Clears OPcache, then gracefully restarts FrankenPHP workers (Caddy Admin API). Equivalent to a container restart.

status.empty: No action has been logged by this plugin yet.

notifications.restartSuccess: OPcache cleared and FrankenPHP workers restarted successfully
notifications.restartError: Error restarting FrankenPHP workers – check log for details
notifications.cacheSuccess: Shopware cache and OPcache cleared successfully
notifications.cacheError: Error clearing cache – check log for details
notifications.cacheRestartSuccess: Cache and OPcache cleared, FrankenPHP workers restarted
notifications.cacheRestartError: Error clearing cache or restarting workers – check log for details
notifications.themeError: Error compiling theme – check log for details
notifications.fullDeployError: Full deploy completed with errors – check log for details
